nodes.name: Webhook: Provision Number
nodes.notes: Called by API: POST /internal/enqueue-provision-number → enqueues → this webhook fires

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO tenant_phone_numbers (tenant_id, twilio_sid, phone_number, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate + Prepare').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Twilio: Purchase Number').first().json.sid }}',
  '{{ $('Twilio: Purchase Number').first().json.phone_number }}',
  'active'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING *;

nodes.name: Handle: No Numbers Available
nodes.notes: TODO: Try fallback area codes before failing

project.name: AutoShop Production
project.description:
Production workflows for AutoShop SMS AI platform.

Handles:
- inbound SMS
- AI conversation handling
- booking automation
- Google Calendar sync
- conversation closing logic

Core stack:
n8n + AI agent + SMS provider + Google Calendar

Used by AutoShop SaaS production environment.
